name: Demon Magic Emperor
overview: "Magic Emperor" is a gripping tale set in a world where magic reigns supreme. Follow the journey of a young protagonist striving to become the legendary Magic Emperor. Filled with intense battles, intricate magic, and deep friendships, it's a thrilling adventure through a fantastical realm where the pursuit of greatness knows no bounds.

trailers.title: Demon is back! Immortal Taoists & Magic Emperor crossover.
